meta.title: Malik NAIRI | Backend & Integration Engineer
meta.description: Backend & Integration Engineer with 5+ years of experience in the banking and insurance sectors. Expert in microservices architecture, distributed systems integration, Apache Camel and AWS Cloud. Transitioning toward project management and digital transformation.

hero.available: Seeking a work-study program in Project Management & Digital Transformation (starting September 2026)
hero.title: Backend & Integration Engineer
hero.subtitle: Banking & Insurance Expertise · Digital Transformation · Future Project Manager
hero.description: Information systems professional with <years>over 5 years</years> of experience in the banking and insurance sectors. I have designed, developed and deployed critical integration solutions for major European players. Transitioning toward project management and digital transformation, I will join the Master 2 in Project Management & Innovation at IAE Paris-Sorbonne in September 2026.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm an information systems professional specializing in
about.intro2: for the banking and insurance sectors. My expertise spans Java backend development, microservices architecture, distributed systems integration (Apache Camel, Enterprise Integration Patterns), API management, middleware and AWS Cloud.
about.current2: since October 2020, I have contributed to the design and technical leadership of a
about.highlight2: centralized integration platform used in critical financial systems
about.current3: and deployed 30+ REST APIs for major European players, including several on-site client missions in Paris. Currently transitioning toward project management and digital transformation, I will join the Master 2 in Project Management & Innovation at IAE Paris-Sorbonne in September 2026.
about.personal: Beyond development, I have grown into technical leadership, cross-functional coordination and innovation. I'm distinguished by my ability to understand business challenges, coordinate stakeholders in international environments, and deliver robust, maintainable, high-impact solutions.

vermeg_backend.title: Backend & Integration Engineer
description: Contributed to the design and technical leadership of a centralized integration platform used in critical financial systems.
Delivered insurance solutions to production for a leading European insurer.
Contributed to AI and digital transformation initiatives.

assuranceIntegration.title: Insurance Integration Platform
assuranceIntegration.description: Design and integration of a distributed architecture supporting insurance underwriting journeys (P&C, Machinery Breakdown, Health, Garage, Boost). 30+ REST APIs, integration of multiple backend systems and a service-oriented architecture, deployed in a critical environment.

servicesBroker.title: Financial Services Broker
servicesBroker.description: Contributed to the design of a centralized integration platform acting as a broker between multiple financial systems. Orchestration of critical business flows, exposure of integration services and support for high-volume systems.

custodianMarketData.title: Custodian & Market Data
custodianMarketData.description: Integration of asset custody systems and market data. Bloomberg connectivity, QuickFIX/J implementation, integration of external data providers and processing of transactional flows.

dataLake.title: Data Lake Integration
dataLake.description: Built integrations feeding a Data Lake. JMS flow management, real-time integration, data processing and distribution at scale.

isabelConnector.title: Isabel Banking Connector
isabelConnector.description: Development and integration of an Isabel banking connector: daily transaction retrieval, processing automation, reliability and monitoring.

pentahoEtl.title: Pentaho Banking ETL PoC
pentahoEtl.description: ETL proof of concept for a banking team, processing 100,000+ records per day. Data mapping and transformation, presented to banking product teams and successfully deployed.

formulaStudent.title: Formula Student Analytics
formulaStudent.description: Academic data analytics project for the Formula Student competition: race performance visualization, decision-support dashboards and telemetry data analysis.

formula1.title: Formula 1 Analytics Dashboard
formula1.description: Personal Formula 1 data analysis project: driver analysis, circuit analysis and season performance analysis through interactive dashboards.

aiPlatform.title: AI-Powered Integration Platform
aiPlatform.description: Evolution of an integration platform embedding generative AI usage: intelligent assistance, automation and improved operational efficiency to modernize integration platforms.

oracleJava.title: Oracle Certified Professional, Java SE 11 Developer

oracleGenAI.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Generative AI Professional

oracleAI.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure AI Foundations Associate

googleDataflow.title: ETL Processing on Google Cloud using Dataflow & BigQuery

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm currently seeking a work-study program in project management and digital transformation. Whether you'd like to discuss a collaboration, a project, or simply connect, my inbox is always open!
contact.readyDescription: I typically respond within 24 hours. Looking forward to hearing from you!
